personal.preferred_title: Senior ETL / Data Integration Developer | Oracle, SQL, Python & Data Quality

summary: Senior Data Engineer and ETL/Data Integration Developer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience designing scalable data pipelines, Oracle/SQL data processing workflows, validation routines, reconciliation controls, and production support procedures. Strong hands-on background in Oracle, PL/SQL, SQL performance tuning, Python, Shell/Korn Shell scripting, ETL/ELT, data quality, data modeling, data warehousing, documentation, and regulated enterprise delivery. Experienced supporting high-volume operational datasets, troubleshooting production failures, automating manual processes, and using AI-assisted workflows to accelerate secure data engineering work.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Designed Oracle schemas, historical retention structures, and warehouse-style reporting datasets to support large-scale capacity analysis, seasonal forecasting, and executive reporting.
Built reusable data processing patterns using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue to support analytics, forecasting, and operational reporting.
Developed validation, reconciliation, balancing, and troubleshooting routines to improve accuracy, completeness, and trustworthiness of recurring production datasets.
Tuned SQL queries, schema access patterns, and pipeline workflows for performance, scalability, and maintainability across recurring data processing workloads.
Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting workflows with data quality checks and production support procedures.
Documented pipeline logic, reporting definitions, operational runbooks, and support steps to improve maintainability and reduce dependency on manual knowledge transfer.
Supported compliance-aware delivery in a regulated banking environment, including access awareness, sensitive data handling expectations, documentation, and production incident response.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for critical hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with technical teams during monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting continuity through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, repeatable procedures, and client training materials for monitoring onboarding, reporting, and support workflows.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap memory issues, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting very high transaction volume.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Built and maintained Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, and SQL-based processing components for high-volume telecom billing and reporting workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.ETL / Data Integration: ETL/ELT Development, Data Integration, Data Pipelines, Reusable Frameworks, Modular Design, Parameterized Processing, Batch Processing, Data Migration
skills.Oracle & SQL: Oracle, PL/SQL, Advanced SQL, SQL Performance Tuning, Query Optimization, Oracle RAC, Oracle Exadata Concepts, Database Design, OLTP, OLAP
skills.Data Quality: Data Profiling, Validation, Reconciliation, Balancing Checks, Data Quality Controls, Completeness Checks, Accuracy Checks, Production Failure Troubleshooting
skills.Programming & Scripting: Python, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, Shell / Korn Shell Scripting, Perl, C++, Java, PL/SQL
skills.Data Warehousing: Data Warehouse Architecture, Data Modeling, Analytical Data Environments, Reporting Structures, Historical Retention, Star Schema, Snowflake Schema
skills.Cloud & Modern Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Snowflake Concepts, Databricks Concepts, Azure Concepts
skills.Governance & Security: Secure Coding Principles, Data Protection, Access Awareness, HIPAA Awareness, PHI/PII Awareness, Regulated Banking Environments, Documentation
skills.Testing & Delivery: Unit Testing, System Testing, Integration Testing, Code Reviews, Walkthroughs, Technical Specifications, Operational Procedures, Debugging
skills.AI-Assisted Data Engineering: AI-Assisted Development, LLM-Supported SQL/ETL Drafting, Automated Documentation Concepts, Data Quality Anomaly Detection Concepts, RAG / Vector Embeddings
skills.Observability & Operations: Production Support, Incident Troubleshooting, Root Cause Analysis, Monitoring, Alerts, BMC TrueSight, CA APM, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting engine using Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Prepared validated telemetry datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and predicted capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking.
